item.title: Australia grants asylum to 5 Iranian women’s soccer players after Trump pressure
item.description: The late-night visa approval came after a days-long operation, authorities said. The players had been criticized back home after they stood silently d...

item.title: In Trump’s Washington, Congress has little power left

item.title: Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson criticizes Supreme Court emergency rulings
item.description: During a public forum, Jackson and conservative Justice Brett M. Kavanaugh offered differing views of President Trump’s wins before the high court.
